ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the asset is deployed */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the asset */,
  "asset_model" TEXT /* Model of the asset */,
  "manufactured_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was manufactured */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the asset */,
  "calibration_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of calibration in days */,
  "battery_life" INTEGER /* Estimated battery life in hours */,
  "data_collection_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which data is collected in minutes */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES asset_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_asset_type FOREIGN KEY ("asset_type") REFERENCES asset_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last environmental survey */,
  "next_survey_due" TEXT /* Date when the next environmental survey is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  "required_maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Recommended maintenance interval in days */,
  "calibration_procedures" TEXT /* Procedures for calibrating the asset */,
  "data_collection_capabilities" TEXT /* Capabilities of the asset in data collection */,
  "operational_range" TEXT /* Operational range of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Numeric code for the status */,
  "action_required" TEXT /* Action required when the asset is in this status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset that collected the sample */,
  "sample_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate where the sample was collected */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate where the sample was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the environmental factor measured */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the asset when the sample was collected */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample collected */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sample value */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the sample */,
  "sample_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_samples_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_samples_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES asset_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset associated with the log */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation or maintenance performed */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log */,
  "log_code" INTEGER /* Numeric code for the log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the log */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the log */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics report */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset associated with the report */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to access the report */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_report_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("report_generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset being deployed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the asset is deployed */,
  "deployment_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asset was deployed */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the deployment */,
  "deployed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who deployed the asset */,
  "deployment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the deployment */,
  "estimated_completion_time" TEXT /* Estimated time when the deployment will be completed */,
  "deployment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_deployments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_deployments_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_deployments_deployed_by FOREIGN KEY ("deployed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_deployments_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES asset_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_maintenance_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_maintenance_maintenance_by FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who has the permission */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset the user has permission for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission */,
  "permission_granted_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who granted the permission */,
  "permission_granted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was granted */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_permissions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_permissions_permission_granted_by FOREIGN KEY ("permission_granted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
